CREATE TABLE more_urls (id INT, url STRING);
SELECT id, url, sys.isaurl(url) AS is_valid FROM more_urls WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM more_urls WHERE sys.isaurl(url) = TRUE);
SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE url LIKE 'http%' AND sys.isaurl(url) = TRUE;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_urls WHERE sys.isaurl(url) = FALSE;
SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE url NOT LIKE 'ftp%' AND sys.isaurl(url) = TRUE;
SELECT url FROM more_urls WHERE sys.isaurl(url) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_urls WHERE sys.isaurl(url) = TRUE);
